name: Dynakit: Basic
summary: The Dynakit: Basic is perfect for ensuring you have necessary spare parts when you need them.
description: The Dynakit: Basic is perfect for ensuring you have necessary spare parts when you need them. It includes both types of O-Rings in plentiful supply for any lost or damaged ones on your DynaVap device's condenser and/or tip. You'll also receive three replacement screens and a fat mouthpiece, which can also function as a 14mm water piece adapter. The DynaWax not only lubricates O-Rings during assembly, but also serves as a superior wood conditioner. A practical part to keep your device working as it should.
